description:
A desktop app for ComfyUI, the most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface

ComfyUI Desktop is a packaged way to use ComfyUI and comes bundled with a few things:
- Stable version of ComfyUI from releases
- ComfyUI_frontend
- ComfyUI-Manager
- uv
On startup, it will install all the necessary python dependencies with uv and start the ComfyUI server. The app will automatically update with stable releases of ComfyUI, ComfyUI-Manager, and the uv executable as well as some desktop specific features.
What's Changed
- Update logos. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1153
- Change tray logo to BW. by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1154
- Use rounded logos by @robinjhuang in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1155
- Update desktop app icons to macOS template by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1156
- Update core to 0.3.33 by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1157
- v0.4.47 by @webfiltered in https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/pull/1158
Full Changelog: https://github.com/Comfy-Org/desktop/compare/v0.4.46...v0.4.47
